channel.title: 成长 on changcui
channel.description: Recent content in 成长 on changcui

item.title: 387. First Unique Character in a String
item.description: classSolution { public: int firstUniqChar(string s) { int rep[256] = {0}; for (int i = 0; i < s.size(); i++) { rep[s[i]] += 1; } for (int i = 0; i < s.size(); i++) { if (rep[s[i]] == 1) return i; } return -1; } };

item.title: 1025. Divisor Game
item.description: dp classSolution { public: bool divisorGame(int N) { if (N == 1) return false; if (N == 2) return true; vector<bool> saved; saved.push_back(false); saved.push_back(true); for (int i = 3; i <= N; i++) { bool res = false; for (int j = 1; j * j < i; j++) { if (i % j == 0 && !saved[i - j - 1]) { res = true; break; } } saved.

item.title: 100. Same Tree
item.description: /** * Definition for a binary tree node. * struct TreeNode { * int val; * TreeNode *left; * TreeNode *right; * TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL) {} * }; */ classSolution { public: bool isSameTree(TreeNode* p, TreeNode* q) { if (p == NULL && q == NULL) return true; else if (p == NULL || q == NULL) return false; return (p->val == q->val) && isSameTree(p->left, q->left) && isSameTree(p->right, q->right); } };

item.title: 455. Assign Cookies
item.description: classSolution { public: int findContentChildren(vector<int>& g, vector<int>& s) { if (g.empty() || s.empty()) return 0; sort(g.begin(), g.end()); sort(s.begin(), s.end()); int rtn = 0; for (auto i = s.back();;) { auto j = g.back(); while (i < j) { g.pop_back(); if (g.empty()) break; j = g.back(); } if (!g.empty()) { rtn += 1; s.pop_back(); g.pop_back(); if (s.empty() || g.empty()) break; i = s.back(); } else { break; } } return rtn; } };

item.title: 350. Intersection of Two Arrays II
item.description: classSolution { public: vector<int> intersect(vector<int>& nums1, vector<int>& nums2) { map<int, int> cnt; for (auto num: nums1) { cnt[num] += 1; } vector<int> rtn; for (auto num: nums2) { auto it = cnt.find(num); if (it == cnt.end() || it -> second == 0) continue; rtn.push_back(num); it -> second -= 1; } return rtn; } };

item.title: 326. Power of Three
item.description: classSolution { public: bool isPowerOfThree(int n) { return n > 0 ? !(1162261467 % n) : 0; } };

item.title: 268. Missing Number
item.description: classSolution { public: int missingNumber(vector<int>& nums) { auto len = nums.size(); auto sum = 0; for (auto num : nums) { sum += num; } return (len + 1) * len / 2 - sum; } };

item.title: 242. Valid Anagram
item.description: classSolution { public: bool isAnagram(string s, string t) { int cnts[255] = {0}; int cntt[255] = {0}; for (auto i : s) cnts[i] += 1; for (auto i : t) cntt[i] += 1; for (auto i = 'a'; i <= 'z'; i++) { if (cnts[i] != cntt[i]) return false; } return true; } };

item.title: 237. Delete Node in a Linked List
item.description: stupid problem /** * Definition for singly-linked list. * struct ListNode { * int val; * ListNode *next; * ListNode(int x) : val(x), next(NULL) {} * }; */ classSolution { public: void deleteNode(ListNode* node) { *node = *node -> next; } };

item.title: 234. Palindrome Linked List
item.description: /** * Definition for singly-linked list. * struct ListNode { * int val; * ListNode *next; * ListNode(int x) : val(x), next(NULL) {} * }; */ classSolution { public: ListNode* reverseList(ListNode* head) { ListNode* pre = NULL; while (head != NULL) { auto tmp = head->next; head->next = pre; pre = head; head = tmp; } return pre; } bool isPalindrome(ListNode* head) { if (head == NULL || head->next == NULL) return true; ListNode* fast = head; ListNode* slow = head; while (fast->next !

item.title: 206. Reverse Linked List
item.description: iteratively /** * Definition for singly-linked list. * struct ListNode { * int val; * ListNode *next; * ListNode(int x) : val(x), next(NULL) {} * }; */ classSolution { public: ListNode* reverseList(ListNode* head) { ListNode* pre = NULL; while (head != NULL) { auto tmp = head->next; head->next = pre; pre = head; head = tmp; } return pre; } }; recursively classSolution { public: ListNode* reverseList(ListNode* head) { if (head == NULL || head -> next == NULL) return head; auto tmp = reverseList(head->next); head->next->next = head; head->next = NULL; return tmp; } };

item.title: 1078. Occurrences After Bigram
item.description: c++ does not have split class Solution(object): def findOcurrences(self, text, first, second): """ :type text: str :type first: str :type second: str :rtype: List[str] """ words = text.split(' ') rtn = [] for i in range(len(words)-2): tmp = words[i:i+3] if first == tmp[0] and second == tmp[1]: rtn.append(tmp[2]) return rtn

item.title: 1170. Compare Strings by Frequency of the Smallest Character
item.description: classSolution { public: int f(string s) { auto rtn = 1; auto cur = s[0]; for (int i = 1; i < s.size(); i++) { if (s[i] < cur) { rtn = 1; cur = s[i]; } else if (s[i] == cur) { rtn += 1; } } return rtn; } vector<int> numSmallerByFrequency(vector<string>& queries, vector<string>& words) { vector<int> wa(11, 0); for (auto w : words) wa[f(w)] += 1; vector<int> rtn; for (auto q : queries) { auto tmp = 0; for (int i = f(q) + 1; i <= 10; i++) tmp += wa[i]; rtn.

item.title: 1160. Find Words That Can Be Formed by Characters
item.description: vector faster than map classSolution { public: int countCharacters(vector<string>& words, string chars) { vector<int> cnt(255, 0); for (auto c : chars) { cnt[c] += 1; } auto rtn = 0; for (auto word : words) { auto tmp = cnt; auto flag = true; for (auto c : word) { if (tmp[c] == 0) { flag = false; break; } else tmp[c] -= 1; } rtn += flag ? word.

item.title: 1154. Day of the Year
item.description: classSolution { public: bool isLeap(int year) { if (year % 100 == 0) return year % 400 == 0; else return year % 4 == 0; } int dayOfYear(string date) { auto year = stoi(date.substr(0, 4)); auto month = stoi(date.substr(5, 2)); auto day = stoi(date.substr(8)); vector<int> days{31, 28, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31}; if (isLeap(year)) days[1] = 29; auto rtn = 0; for (int i = 1; i < month; i++) rtn += days[i - 1]; rtn += day; return rtn; } };

item.title: 1137. N-th Tribonacci Number
item.description: classSolution { public: int tribonacci(int n) { int tri[38]; tri[0] = 0; tri[1] = 1; tri[2] = 1; for (int i = 3; i <= n; i++) { tri[i] = tri[i - 1] + tri[i - 2] + tri[i - 3]; } return tri[n]; } };

item.title: 1128. Number of Equivalent Domino Pairs
item.description: classSolution { public: int numEquivDominoPairs(vector<vector<int>>& dominoes) { int cnt[10][10] = {0}; for (auto dom : dominoes) { cnt[dom[0]][dom[1]] += 1; } int rtn = 0; for (int i = 1; i <= 9; i++) { for (int j = i; j <= 9; j++) { if (i == j) { auto tmp = cnt[i][j]; if (tmp >= 2) { rtn += tmp * (tmp - 1) / 2; } } else { auto tmp = (cnt[i][j] + cnt[j][i]); if (tmp >= 2) { rtn += tmp * (tmp - 1) /2; } } } } return rtn; } };

item.title: 1122. Relative Sort Array
item.description: classSolution { public: vector<int> relativeSortArray(vector<int>& arr1, vector<int>& arr2) { vector<bool> first(1001, false); for (auto i : arr2) { first[i] = true; } auto len = arr1.size(); for (int i = 0; i < len;) { auto rt = find(arr2.begin(), arr2.end(), arr1[i]); if (rt != arr2.end()) { if (first[arr1[i]]) { first[arr1[i]] = false; } else { arr2.insert(rt, arr1[i]); } arr1.erase(arr1.begin() + i); len -= 1; } else { i += 1; } } sort(arr1.

item.title: 1114. Print in Order
item.description: classFoo { public: bool mutex1, mutex2; Foo() { mutex1 = true; mutex2 = true; } void first(function<void()> printFirst) { // printFirst() outputs "first". Do not change or remove this line. printFirst(); this->mutex1 = false; } void second(function<void()> printSecond) { while (this->mutex1) {} // printSecond() outputs "second". Do not change or remove this line. printSecond(); this->mutex2 = false; } void third(function<void()> printThird) { while (this->mutex1 | this->mutex2) {} // printThird() outputs "third".

item.title: 1108. Defanging an IP Address
item.description: insert classSolution { public: string defangIPaddr(string address) { for (int i = 0; i < address.size(); i++) { if (address[i] == '.') { address.insert(address.begin() + i, '['); address.insert(address.begin() + i + 2, ']'); i += 2; } } return address; } };

item.title: 1103. Distribute Candies to People
item.description: math classSolution { public: vector<int> distributeCandies(int candies, int num_people) { int epoch = 0; for (; ; epoch++) { int needed = (epoch + 1) * num_people * ((epoch + 1) * num_people + 1) / 2; if (candies <= needed) break; } vector<int> result(num_people, 0); for (int i = 1; i <= num_people; i++) { result[i - 1] += epoch * i + num_people * epoch * (epoch - 1) / 2; } candies -= epoch * num_people * (epoch * num_people + 1) / 2; for (int i = 1; i <= num_people; i++) { int needed = i + epoch * num_people; if (candies <= needed) { result[i - 1] += candies; break; } else { result[i - 1] += needed; candies -= needed; } } return result; } };

item.title: 1089. Duplicate Zeros
item.description: if (i + 1 < len) classSolution { public: void duplicateZeros(vector<int>& arr) { auto len = arr.size(); for (int i = 0; i < len; i++) { if (arr[i] == 0) { for (int j = len - 2; j >= i + 1; j--) { arr[j + 1] = arr[j]; } if (i + 1 < len) arr[i + 1] = 0; i += 1; } } } }; vector classSolution { public: void duplicateZeros(vector<int>& arr) { auto len = arr.

item.title: 1051. Height Checker
item.description: sort classSolution { public: int heightChecker(vector<int>& heights) { auto sorted = heights; sort(sorted.begin(), sorted.end()); auto result = 0; for (int i = 0; i < heights.size(); i++) { if (sorted[i] != heights[i]) { result++; } } return result; } };

item.title: 1047. Remove All Adjacent Duplicates In String
item.description: stack: classSolution { public: string removeDuplicates(string S) { string result = ""; stack<char> chars; for (auto c : S) { if (chars.empty() || c != chars.top()) { chars.push(c); } else { chars.pop(); } } while (!chars.empty()) { result += chars.top(); chars.pop(); } reverse(result.begin(), result.end()); return result; } }; string(faster): classSolution { public: string removeDuplicates(string S) { string result = ""; for (auto c : S) { if (result.empty() || result.
